_rationale.purpose: Parity proof for DART-6lwWAw28lQfj: `lci search --regex --max-count` must mirror Go. Go's standard search ignores --max-count entirely (cmd/lci/search.go forwards into SearchOptions but the standard-results display writer never applies the cap). C++ previously capped client-side AFTER regex_filter_results, producing fewer rows than Go.
_rationale.fix: Stripped client-side max-count post-filter from run_search (src/cli/search.cpp). One-line stderr notice + fall-through to standard display.
_rationale.tier: stable: stdout matches Go byte-for-byte after standard text_normalize.
